> Yes — we deliver locally in

args.name: Office Dessert Box — Sugar Land Fridays
args.objective: Drive Friday office-box orders from Sugar Land / Energy Corridor offices (10-mi radius)
args.offer: Office dessert box at $120 — ready-made HappyCake line, free Friday delivery within 10 miles. Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
args.targetAudience: Office managers and admin assistants in Sugar Land and west Houston, ordering Thursday/Friday team treats

args.name: Cake "Honey" Family Sundays
args.objective: Whole-cake Sunday family pickups in Sugar Land
args.offer: Whole cake "Honey" at $55, ready Sunday morning — the original taste of happiness. Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
args.targetAudience: Women 25–65 with families in Sugar Land / Houston metro — Anglo, Hispanic, Central+South Asian diaspora

args.name: WhatsApp Regulars — Pistachio Roll
args.objective: Reactivate prior buyers via a low-friction WhatsApp ping
args.offer: Fresh pistachio roll at $9.50 — tender, honest, ready today. Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
args.targetAudience: Repeat customers who previously messaged HappyCake on WhatsApp

args.approvalNote: Lead campaign — office-box payload hint, B2B Friday delivery

args.reason: Birthday cake for Saturday at $95 — custom-cake intent needs Askhat's confirmation on capacity and decoration scope.
Office box for 12 ($120) — B2B, fastest path is WhatsApp confirmation of delivery slot.
Whole honey cake same-day pickup — ready-made line, self-serve checkout on happycake.us.
Custom Saturday birthday cake — Askhat owns custom-decoration scoping and pricing.
Lead arrived through the IG family-cake campaign; reply in IG DM to keep context with the creative.
Same-day pickup — happycake.us /cakes/honey is the lowest-friction conversion path.
Custom-cake intent — owner approval per HappyCake policy.
Office-box reactivation lead — WhatsApp matches the campaign channel and confirms delivery quickly.
Repeat WA buyer asking same-day pickup — keep them in WhatsApp where they already converse with HappyCake.

args.adjustment: Add $25 (→$225) and tighten geo to 10-mi Sugar Land + Energy Corridor; keep Friday-delivery creative.
args.expectedImpact: +~8 office-box orders (~$960 contribution at 60% margin), holds 13× ROAS.

args.adjustment: Add $25 (→$225) and concentrate impressions Thu–Sat for Sunday whole-cake "Honey" pickups.
args.expectedImpact: +~9 whole-cake orders (~$495 revenue) at the current 14.5× ROAS.

args.adjustment: Cut budget $100→$50 and limit to repeat WA buyers from last 90 days; absorbs the $75 budget-pressure signal.
args.expectedImpact: ~$588 projected revenue (down $588) but frees $50 for higher-ROAS channels and stays within pressure cap.

payload.text: Cake was great but pickup timing was confusing.

payloadPreview.text: Cake was great but pickup timing was confusing.

args.reply:
Hi, friend — thank you for the kind word on the cake, and sorry the pickup timing felt unclear. That's on us to make obvious, not on you to decode. Here's what to expect on a normal day: your pickup window is on the order confirmation, and the counter holds your box under your name from the start of that window until close. If you're ever unsure, text us and we'll have it ready at the door. We'll also tighten the pickup line on the confirmation this week so the next visit is smoother.

— the HappyCake team

label: gmb_review
responsePreview: The provided review payload (rating 3, "pickup timing was confusing") has no matching `reviewId` in the sandbox — `gb_list_reviews` only returns rev_001–rev_004, and `gb_simulate_reply` rejected `rev_005` as "Review not found". I can't record a reply without a valid id, and the sandbox has no endpoi
